chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-855 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For order on CMA No. 4561/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on office objection 3. For order on CMA No. 2253/2025 4. For order on CMA No. 6886/2024 5. For order on CMA No. 4383/2024 6. For hearing of main case 03-03-2025 Mr. Dedan Shah Advocate holds brief for Mr. Shaikh Samad Yar Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Kashif Hanif, Assistant Attorney General 1. Urgency granted. 2-6. Per Order dated 27.02.2023 passed in C.P. D-6944 of 2022, the Petitioner is obliged to approach the Grievance Commissioner in the first instance and no direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is warranted. In view hereof, Petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed along with pending applications. Judge Judge Amjad PS
